raw.message: Star a capybara in this text-based roguelike RPG!

hook.summary: UGC creator in a onesie answers rapid-fire questions about the game's monetization and accessibility.
hook.visual_action: A man in a capybara onesie shakes his head 'no' and then shows his phone screen to the camera.
hook.text_overlay: Does Capybara Go have Ads? Can I download it for free?

scene_flow: UGC creator addresses ad-free gameplay with a head shake.
Creator shows the App Store listing to prove the game is free to download.
Creator dismisses the idea that the game is difficult to play.
Creator shares a promotional code 'lucky666' for free rewards.
End card displays the game logo and a 'Play Now' button.
on_screen_text: Can I download it for free?
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who prioritize ad-free experiences and cute, accessible gameplay.
